title: PACT Join Response
description: Response body for POST /api/pact/{documentId}/join and POST /api/pact/{documentId}/join-token

registrationId.description: Unique identifier for this agent registration.

contextMode.description: Context mode assigned to the agent.

allowedSections.description: Section IDs the agent can access (only set when contextMode is 'section-scoped').

apiKey.description: Document-scoped API key for authentication. Only returned on join-token (BYOK) flow.

trustLevel.description: Trust level assigned to the agent.

clearanceLevel.description: Classification clearance level granted (if information barriers are active).

capabilities.description: Available capabilities at the negotiated protocol version.

joinedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the agent joined.
